meta.meta_description: Our Bar ATL is a bar + kitchen with live local entertainment at 339 Edgewood Ave SE. Its local Atlanta roots, thriving nightlife scene, and comfortable atmosphere cement its status as one of the city's go-to spots for a great time out.
